MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Anne Hipshman; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported.
Appearances on Thursday, March 20, 2014:
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. of Bornstein and Bornstein, appearing for Plaintiff HONGYAN LI, who is also present;
Jessica Bugo, Esq. appearing by Limited Scope Representation for Defendants MIGUEL ANGEL SEGURA and IRY DEL ROSARIO, who are also both present

Judge Pro Tem, the litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of MAR-24-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
